{{Event Header|StS2 Bugslayer.png}} {{E|Bugslayer|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Learn Extermination Technique}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Exterminate||2}} to your Deck.}}
{{Frame|Learn Squash Technique}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Squash||2}} to your Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time! The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter. "Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?" How polite. You nod and accept his offer.
{{Frame|Learn Extermination Technique}}
"I see... you wish to learn the Extermination Technique. Very good..." He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver... "THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!" He boasts while holding up a can of Insecticide.
{{Frame|Learn Squash Technique}}
"I see... you wish to learn the Squash Technique. Very good..." He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver... "THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!" He boasts while stepping on a giant bug.
{{Frame|Leave}}
Silently the figure nods at you, and then walks away.
